name: TeamChat
description: Open-source multi-agent TeamChat workspace with real-time messaging, setup wizard, PWA, Android packaging, and optional channel adapters.

port.label: TeamChat port
port.help: HTTP port used by the standalone TeamChat server.

publicBaseUrl.label: Public base URL
publicBaseUrl.help: External URL when TeamChat is exposed through a tunnel or reverse proxy.

authMode.label: Authentication mode
authMode.help: Use password mode before exposing TeamChat beyond localhost.

agentDiscoveryPaths.label: Agent discovery paths
agentDiscoveryPaths.help: Comma-separated folders or JSON files used to build the local agent roster.

channels.label: Monitored channels
channels.help: Comma-separated channels shown in TeamChat channel status.
